'''Andasala''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]], located on the [[Llanic Spice Run/Legends|Llanic Spice Run]] in the [[Andasala system/Legends|Andasala system]] near [[Svivren]].

==Description==
A haven for criminals and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], the world was settled as a mining colony for [[Gesenix Mining]]. Seeing a flood of settlers after word of its lush natural resource supply spread, many colonists came from nearby Svivren.

Andasala was a notable transshipment point in the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade.<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
Discovered after the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="TEA" /> Andasala remained outside the Republic's borders throughout its history.

Avoiding the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Andasala attracted attention during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], as many [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] battles were fought along the shipping lanes surrounding the world. It wasn't until the rise of crime lord [[Valis Lorn]] that the world began to nationalize, with the settlements further developing and cleaning up, as the seedier parts were cleared out and made relatively safe. With Lorn's cartel running the government, the small time criminals were driven offworld. The [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Sires Vant]] ran a money-lending system on the planet. Establishing the ''[[Andasala Achievement News]]'', the inhabitants of the world stayed on top of galactic events.

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Andasala was created for the [[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations|eleventh issue]] of the [[Galaxy Guide]], published in [[1994]]. It was later mentioned in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', which perpetuates the misspelling Andalasa, first found in ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''. The mistake was eventually corrected in [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]].
